profile: My research focuses on the intersection between **Extended Reality (XR)** and **Artificial Intelligence (AI)**, with the goal of developing innovative solutions that support human activity across interdisciplinary contexts. Work spans immersive experiences in _Virtual Reality (VR)_, _Augmented Reality (AR)_ and _Mixed Reality (MR)_; the design of advanced Machine Learning and Deep Learning architectures; and their integration within unified **Extended Artificial Intelligence (XRAI)** frameworks.

Research is currently carried out at the [VRAI Lab](https://vrailab.it/) (directed by Prof. Primo Zingaretti and Prof. Emanuele Frontoni) within the SPOCRI Department, University of Macerata. Long-standing collaborations remain active with the [VARLAB](https://site.unibo.it/varlab/en) (Prof. Gustavo Marfia) at the University of Bologna and with the [CFC International Research Center](https://centri.unibo.it/culturefashioncommunication/en).

interests.title: Computer Vision & Generative AI for XR
interests.body: Deep Learning for multimodal object & scene understanding; Multimodal LLMs, Large Reconstruction Models and Neural Rendering for context-aware 3D content generation in immersive environments.

interests.title: Human–machine interaction in XR
interests.body: Cognitive & perceptual modelling of user behaviour, attentional regulation, sense of presence; Digital Twins and multisensory environments for adaptive, personalised experiences.

interests.title: Extended Artificial Intelligence (XRAI)
interests.body: Frameworks bridging perception and generation across XR pipelines, with applications to creative industries, cultural heritage, manufacturing, education and retail.

theoretical.title: Vision & multimodal recognition
theoretical.body: Supervised & unsupervised Deep Learning for object/scene classification and multimodal identification — including augmented wine recognition and socio-historical analysis of vernacular photography.

theoretical.title: Generative AI for XR
theoretical.body: Systematisation of Multimodal LLMs, Large Reconstruction Models and Neural Rendering to produce context-aware 3D content. See _MineVRA_ (Best Paper, IEEE VR 2025) and _X-NR_.

theoretical.title: Digital Twins & collaboration
theoretical.body: XR frameworks to annotate, visualise and manipulate Digital Twins — and to study procedural learning (e.g., sequential instruction learning with the Rubik's cube).

theoretical.title: Aesthetic & emotional perception
theoretical.body: Evaluation of aesthetic emotions and social presence in immersive musical experiences (live vs. 2D vs. 3D recorded concerts).

applied.title: Creative Industries
applied.body: Immersive x-commerce, Human Digital Twins for personalised retail interactions, generative AI in XR collaborative environments (_CreAIXR_).

applied.title: Cultural Heritage
applied.body: The _IMAGO_ dataset (80k+ photos, 1845–2009), AR-based family-album digitisation on Hololens 2, and _DanXe_ — an XRAI framework for dance heritage.

applied.title: Industry & manufacturing
applied.body: _Annholotator_, an MR collaborative platform for Lean Manufacturing work instructions; AR systems for wine-label recognition; modular XR flight simulators (_Unity-VRLines_).

groups.html: **VARLAB** — University of Bologna (CS & Arts Depts.) since Nov 2020.
**CFC — Culture, Fashion, Communication International Research Center**, UniBO, Nov 2020 — Feb 2024.
